const { google } = require\('googleapis'\);
const fs = require\('fs'\);

const key = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./service-account.json', 'utf8'\)\);
const auth = new google.auth.GoogleAuth\({
  credentials: key,
  scopes: ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive'],
}\);
const drive = google.drive\({ version: 'v3', auth }\);

const content = \\`JIN SESSION LOG — February 21, 2026
Generated automatically at end of session
=====================================================

WHO JIN IS
----------
Jin is the AI Chief of Staff for Joe Ko, founder/CEO of 88 Venture Studio.
Running on: Mac Mini M4 16GB \(Agents-Mac-mini.local\), user: agentserver
Project directory: /Users/agentserver/studio88-agent
Stack: Node.js, Anthropic SDK \(claude-sonnet-4-6\), @slack/bolt, googleapis, mammoth

WHAT WE BUILT TODAY
-------------------
1. Google Drive integration
   - Service account: jin-drive-access@curious-mender-488106-u2.iam.gserviceaccount.com
   - Reads .docx \(mammoth\) and Google Docs \(export API\)
   - AI Hub folder ID: 125EAuI55RG3Os59rUeuIAkbv47To4s70
   - Files loaded at startup: Studio88_Master_Context + Conversation Log Feb 20

2. Jin Slack bot — FULLY RUNNING
   - App name: JIN \(already set up in Studio 88 workspace\)
   - Socket Mode \(no public URL needed\)
   - Joe can DM Jin directly in Slack — it's in his direct messages sidebar
   - Bot token and app token stored in /Users/agentserver/studio88-agent/.env
   - Responds with natural prose, no excessive bullets/headers
   - Per-thread conversation history \(in RAM — lost on restart, see ISSUES below\)

3. Image/screenshot support — BUILT, BUG FIXED
   - Downloads images from Slack using bot token auth
   - Requires files:read scope \(user added this\)
   - BUG FIXED THIS SESSION: file-only messages \(no text\) were being skipped due to subtype check
   - Fixed: now allows file_share subtype through
   - NOTE: user may need to confirm new bot token if app was reinstalled after adding files:read

4. URL fetching — WORKING
   - Auto-detects URLs in messages, fetches page content, strips HTML
   - Passes content to Claude as context

5. Communication style
   - Natural prose, warm and direct, no corporate fluff
   - No threading in DMs \(replies inline\)
   - Threads in channels only

KNOWN ISSUES / NEXT SESSION PRIORITIES
---------------------------------------
1. AMNESIA \(most critical\)
   - Conversation history lives in RAM only
   - Every Jin restart = full memory wipe
   - Fix: persist conversation history to local file, load at startup
   - Designed but not yet built

2. GOOGLE DOC LINKS IN SLACK
   - If Joe pastes a docs.google.com link, URL fetcher hits auth wall
   - Fix: detect Drive/Docs URLs and route through Drive API \(already authenticated\)
   - Not yet built

3. SLACK THINKING INDICATOR \(Option B — agreed\)
   - No visual feedback when Jin receives a message
   - Fix: immediate ack message posted before processing, then edit in place with final response
   - Single evolving message \(not 3 separate messages\)
   - Rotating casual tone library \("got it...", "hmm...", "on it..."\)
   - Not yet built

4. MEMORY SYSTEM \(full architecture — designed, not built\)
   - live-log.md: append-only, timestamped, raw capture
   - weekly-digest.md: compressed every Sunday
   - quarterly-archive.md: permanent distilled rules/signals
   - Filter: only log things with clear path to REVENUE or MARGIN
   - Decay model: Fresh > Compressing > Distilled > Gone
   - Winning signals get MORE detail over time, not less
   - History only kept if it reduces risk, surfaces opportunity, or prevents repeat mistakes

BUILD ORDER FOR NEXT SESSION
------------------------------
1. Persist conversation history to disk \(quick amnesia fix — 20 min\)
2. Google Doc link detection via Drive API \(20 min\)
3. Slack thinking indicator — Option B, evolving message \(30 min\)
4. Full memory system with Drive logging \(1-2 hours\)

KEY CONTEXT ABOUT JOE
----------------------
- MC = Joe's main computer \(MacBook, uses VS Code + Remote SSH to access Mac Mini\)
- Joe works late \(this session ran ~11pm-1:30am\)
- Wants Jin to feel like a teammate, not a tool
- Communication: direct, no fluff, ask one question at a time
- Abbreviations: MC = main computer
- Joe is already talking to Jin in Slack — it works, it just has amnesia

SLACK SETUP \(already done, Jin doesn't need to re-ask about this\)
------------------------------------------------------------------
- Jin Slack app: configured, installed in Studio 88 workspace
- Bot token: xoxb-70452152384-... \(in .env\)
- App token: xapp-1-A0AG7LRLVEZ-... \(in .env\)
- Scopes added: chat:write, im:history, im:write, app_mentions:read, channels:history, files:read
- Profile picture: being set up by Joe separately
- Jin appears in Joe's DM sidebar — Joe can message Jin directly
- Socket Mode: enabled

To start Jin: node agent.js
\\`;

async function main\(\) {
  const res = await drive.files.create\({
    requestBody: {
      name: 'Jin Session Log - Feb 21 2026.txt',
      parents: ['125EAuI55RG3Os59rUeuIAkbv47To4s70'],
      mimeType: 'text/plain',
    },
    media: {
      mimeType: 'text/plain',
      body: content,
    },
    fields: 'id, name',
  }\);
  console.log\('Created:', res.data.name, '| ID:', res.data.id\);
}

main\(\).catch\(console.error\);
" 2>&1)
